codeReview.summary: The procure-to-pay review doc satisfies VAL-P2P-001. It covers supplier CRUD and lifecycle controls, purchase-order workflow, goods receipts, raw-material purchase invoicing, purchase returns, supplier settlement, ledger/aging views, invariants, retry behavior, and integration side effects with code-grounded evidence.

summary: PASS. The procure-to-pay review artifact is complete, consistent with the underlying controllers/services/tests, and documents the required invariants, failure points, settlement/accounting boundaries, and integrity risks without scrutiny-level defects.
